message:
fix(review-r5/storage): saturating_sub on commit-time delta + clippy useless_vec

Guard relative_date_from_secs against pathologically corrupt commit
timestamps (e.g. crafted `author.when().seconds()` returning i64::MIN
or i64::MAX): the raw `now - authored_secs` can panic in debug builds
or wrap in release. Switch to `saturating_sub` so the subsequent
`< 0` / day/hour/minute classification still produces a sensible
fallback.

Drive-by: fix `clippy::useless_vec` in db_and_storage_message_pipeline
test fixture (vec![...] -> [...]).
